$description: Plannivo typography. The Duotone family is the brand display face (kite-brand, Basic Latin only); Gotham-TR is the same-brand fallback that covers Turkish (ğ ı ş İ) and accented Latin. Applied in the app via utility classes on headings/brand text — NOT as a global body font. Body text uses the Ant Design / system sans default.

display.stack: 'Duotone Bold Extended', 'Gotham Bold', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
display.use: Hero / page titles / big brand statements.

headingBold.stack: 'Duotone Bold', 'Gotham Bold', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

regular.stack: 'Duotone Regular', 'Gotham Medium', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
regular.use: Brand body lines / lead paragraphs when a branded look is wanted.

lightCondensed.stack: 'Duotone Light Condensed', 'Gotham Light', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

body.use: Default UI / body text (Ant Design default). Do NOT force Duotone on long paragraphs — it ships Basic Latin only.

labels.$note: Form labels in the app are uppercased, letter-spaced, small — a recognizable Plannivo tell.
